description_long: This is an ornate, traditional-style chaise with a dark wooden frame featuring intricate carved detailing along the base and backrest. The seat consists of three thick, plush cushions upholstered in a patterned fabric with a muted brown and gold color palette. The backrest is high and gently curved, adorned with matching decorative pillows, including two large square pillows, two smaller square pillows, and a central rectangular bolster. Both armrests are rolled and generously padded, seamlessly integrated into the frame and covered in the same patterned upholstery. The legs are short, rounded, and made of dark wood, providing a sturdy base. The overall appearance is luxurious and inviting, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A richly detailed, traditional chaise with a carved wooden frame, patterned upholstery, and multiple decorative cushions. It features rolled armrests, a high curved backrest, and plush seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of cushions, ornate wooden frame, and both rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the rolled armrest, and the layered cushion arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous carved wooden backrest and the solid wood construction without visible cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the rolled armrest and the profile of the plush cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, gently curved, and features ornate carved woodwork along the top edge. It is continuous without segmentation and is visually softened by the arrangement of decorative pillows.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, rolled, generously padded, and integrated into the wooden frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, rounded, and made of dark wood, with a simple, sturdy design that complements the ornate base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is patterned with a subtle, intricate design in muted brown and gold tones, giving a classic, elegant appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large seat cushions and five decorative back pillows: two large square, two smaller square, and one central rectangular bolster, all arranged for both comfort and visual appeal.
